_comment: Centralized version pins for TypeScript/Web/RN deps. Referenced by syncpack (.syncpackrc.json) to enforce consistency across all package.json files in the monorepo. When bumping a value here, run `npx syncpack fix-mismatches` to propagate the change. See scripts/validation/check_typescript_centralization.sh for the CI gate.

_notes.long: Held at ^5.x. The published @runanywhere/proto-ts is generated against long 5.x; 6.x (if released) would be a separate migration.
_notes.protobufjs: Held at ^7.x. The published @runanywhere/proto-ts is generated against protobufjs 7.x; 8.x is a separate migration.
_notes.eslint: ESLint 9.x is now used across the monorepo (including RN packages). @react-native/eslint-config 0.85.x supports ESLint 8 and 9, so RN parity is preserved.
_notes.vite: Pinned for examples/web only. Playground/on-device-browser-agent stays on ^5.x (separate migration).
_notes.typescript-eslint: Applies only to the unified 'typescript-eslint' meta-package consumed by the web SDK packages. The separate @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin + @typescript-eslint/parser packages used by the RN tree are not covered here.
